demographics.living_situation: shares a flat with a roommate

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I'm passing massive, foul-smelling watery stools constantly, and I feel so weak I passed out when I stood up. My roommate is here helping me but I can barely keep any fluid down.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The diarrhoea got really bad over the last couple of days and now I'm fainting when I try to stand — I'm scared I'll fall over.

symptom_narrative.onset: the really heavy watery diarrhoea started about two days ago, but my guts have been off and on for about six months
symptom_narrative.duration: 48 hours of constant diarrhoea on top of about six months of tummy trouble
symptom_narrative.character: huge, watery, really foul-smelling stools that float, with lots of bloating, wind, and a crampy sore belly
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: I feel completely wiped out — I actually blacked out when I stood up earlier
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: running to the toilet constantly the last two days
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing really; lying down stops me feeling faint
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: standing up makes me really dizzy and I nearly black out
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: really weak and tired all the time, dizzy, my mouth feels dry, and I've lost about 5 kg without trying even though I'm eating normally
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I've had bouts of this diarrhoea come and go for about six months
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I can't keep fluids down properly and I'm stuck in bed — scared to stand up in case I fall

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: iron deficiency anaemia — my GP found it recently and the iron tablets just aren't helping my tiredness
past_medical_history.when_diagnosed: recently, in the last few months
past_medical_history.how_managed: iron tablets, but no improvement at all

current_medications_as_reported.name_as_patient_states: over-the-counter anti-diarrhoea tablets and some iron supplements

social_history_volunteered.diet_and_exercise: eating normally and my appetite's ok, but I keep losing weight
social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: share a flat with a roommate who's been getting me fluids, but I'm struggling to keep them down

objective_data_offered.value: around 58 kg, and I reckon I've dropped about 5 kg over the last few months
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient estimate from home scales, not a clinician measurement

objective_data_offered.value: itchy little grouped blisters on both my elbows and my knees that I keep scratching
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: self-shown over video, not a dermatological examination

objective_data_offered.value: my roommate says I look really pale and washed out and my lips look dry
